description: Add on-street parking areas to the Bologna Pasubio corridor scenario and generate parking utilization statistics. Using the scenario files in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/, configure at least 4 parking areas in a new additional file pasubio_parking.add.xml (IDs starting with 'pa_') with a combined roadside capacity of at least 40 spaces, specifying lane, startPos, endPos, and roadsideCapacity for each. Define at least 5 vehicles in parking_vehicles.rou.xml with staggered departure times that utilize these parking areas for durations of at least 60 seconds. Execute a simulation via a new configuration file run_parking.sumocfg that integrates these new elements with the existing network (pasub
